milestone.title: Goal-auto-ready — goal-clarity earns autonomy
milestone.goal: a goal is auto-ready when its acceptance criteria are concrete enough for the engine to self-verify the result against — so autonomy is earned by goal-clarity, not assumed (with auto seeded as the project default)

init-auto-default.title: Project seeds autonomy: auto by default at init

goal-auto-ready-gate.title: Define + check an auto-ready goal (machine-checkable acceptance criteria)
